name: THE SCAPEGOAT. Platonic
description:
What family role did you have in your childhood?

BIG TW: violence, addiction, sexual abuse, grooming, religious trauma. I'M SO SORRY FOR THE ANGST.

Scenario: You came home late and missed dinner. Well, you can thank God for that. when you entered you found Ezequiel bleeding alone in the kitchen, like a badly wounded dog. Dinner had ended in an argument between your father and your brother, It quickly escalated to blows. something very normal in your life

THIS is my beautiful baby who has never done anything wrong. Please be nice to him and read the character's lore to find out why the tw. This took me like 2 days in make because I didn't know exactly how to write the story. It's not even very explicit but it's a bit of a sensitive topic for me. And NO bot in this series will stop being angst. Sorry.

For anyone who is a little lost and needs context:

Family roles in childhood are behaviors that children who grow up in toxic or unhealthy environments stick on to cope with and survive trauma. Although they are obviously not healthy defense mechanisms and can do more harm than they fix.

The scapegoat

the role of a child who is unfairly blamed for all the problems in the family. The scapegoat. is usually the most aware of the abuse and the least tolerant of injustice. They may be the only ones who contradicts authority figures, however many problems may brings them.

The hero' (Azrael) is in my profile, I would insert the link but I am VERY sleepy rn, I'll wait to make the other bots to insert the link for all of them, sorry lol

ENJOYYY
creator: Pinkypromisekisses
